Package de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl

Class SpecificationInjector

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.SourceVisitor
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl.SpecificationInjector
public class SpecificationInjector extends SourceVisitor
Writes JML* translation of RIFL specifications to Java files. This is a manipulating Recoder source visitor. Implementation warning: manipulating the AST before traversing it may have unexpected results.
